title: reseda propinqua var. decursiva
intro: Reseda propinqua var. decursiva, also known as the spreading reseda or thread-leaf reseda, is a variety of the reseda plant, a flowering plant native to Asia and Australia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a useful treatment for various skin issues. Herbal preparations of Reseda propinqua var. decursiva can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by applying the leaves directly to the affected area as a poultice.
